trust_boundary: Host-issued local SHA-256 seal; establishes local ordering and byte integrity only. It is not an external timestamp authority or proof against a compromised host.
execution_envelope_contract: remediation_v7_task_message is UTF-8 and ends with one LF; append ASCII PREEXECUTION_SEAL_SHA256=<sha256 of this seal> immediately after those bytes, then append one LF. No blank line intervenes.
